nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.id AS faculty_id, fc.name AS faculty_name, qp.title AS paper_title, b.id AS board_id
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   question_paper qp ON qp.id = ak.qp_id
JOIN   board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id
JOIN   board_coordinator bc ON bc.board_id = b.id AND bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: board_coordinator does NOT have qp_id. Join to board: board b ON b.id = bc.board_id, then use b.qp_id.
